title: codia microphylla
intro: Codia microphylla, also known as the 'Small-leaved Codia', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rubiaceae. It is a shrub native to tropical regions of the Pacific Islands, with leaves used in traditional medicine. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, which have been used to treat various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Codia microphylla include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are believed to offer health benefits such as reducing fever, alleviating respiratory issues, and supporting digestive health.
